date_notes: Announcement October 23; Back to School Act tabled and passed October 27 (EVT-036).
title_en: Premier announces intent to use notwithstanding clause four days before Back to School Act introduced
title_fr: La première ministre annonce son intention d'invoquer la clause dérogatoire quatre jours avant le dépôt de la loi Retour à l'école
description_en: Premier Smith announces at a news conference that the government will table Bill 2 (the Back to School Act) on Monday October 27, four days away. An order paper is published on the Legislature website the same day specifying one hour of debate per reading. Smith: 'the precondition has to be getting kids back to school.' ATA anticipates the legislation but says it needs to see the bill text. Thousands of teachers rally on legislature grounds the same afternoon. The government formally tables and passes Bill 2 on October 27 (EVT-036).

relations.note: Four-day warning before EVT-036 (Back to School Act).
